description.desc_thousand_char: Northern Aromatics Private Limited. (NAPL) is a fragrance and flavor manufacturing organization. It offers products in categories such as fragrances (cream, skin tonic, conditioner, hair serum, hair gel, and cream), flavor (candy, chewing tobacco, pan masala, chocolates, chewing gum, ice creams), essential oils (ajowan oil, anise oil, basil oil, cedar wood, cardamom oil, clove leaf oil, cajeput oil, cinnamon bark oil, elemi oil, lemongrass oil, lemon oil, rose oil, wintergreen oil, and many more). Its manufacturing units are in Sahibabad, Baddi, and Assam. It has a production capacity of 10MT per day. The company was incorporated in 1979 and has its registered office located in Delhi.

open_charges_latest_event.rate_of_interest: Interest shall be payable on the banking facilities as per banks tariff subject however that the bank shall have the right to change the rate of interest after giving notice to Co.
open_charges_latest_event.property_particulars: Exclusive charge over bonds of the company issued by National Highway Authority of India 1. NHAI- 29000 Units2. NHAI- 40 Unitsmore particularly described in attached supplemental Deed of pledge dated 21 Feb 2019.
open_charges_latest_event.extent_and_operation: Exclusive charge over bonds of the company issued by National Highway Authority of India 1. NHAI- 29000 Units2. NHAI- 40 Unitsmore particularly described in attached supplemental Deed of pledge dated 21 Feb 2019.
open_charges_latest_event.other_terms: In case the Company fails to fulfill its obligation under the agreement, the Bank shall be entitled to take possession of the Bonds marked under lien to bank and utilize the proceeds in full or part settlement of its claims.
open_charges_latest_event.modification_particulars: By this modification, Credit facilities are enhanced from INR 20 Mn to INR 50 Mn and facilities are now additionally secured by 40 units of NHAI Bonds in addition to existing bonds of NHAI- 29000 units more particularly described in attached supplemental Deed of pledge dated 21 Feb 2019.

disclosures_auditor_report.auditor:
) According to information and explanations given to us, the company is generally regular in depositing with appropriate authorities undisputed statutory dues on account of income tax, sales tax, service tax, custom duty, excise duty, GST, goods and services tax and cess. According to the information and explanations given to us, no undisputed amounts payable in respect of the aforesaid dues were outstanding as at 31st March, 2021 for a period of more than six months from the date of becoming payable. 


VII b)    Dues of Sales Tax as on 31st March, 2021 not being paid on account of dispute pending before Allahabad High Court. 

Nature Of Statute	Nature Of Dues 	Amount (Rs.)	Period to which the Amount Related	Issue In brief
 Sales Tax	Rate of Sales Tax / Trade Tax	21592266	1997-98, 1998-99, 1999-2000, 2000-01, 2005-06	Classification of Lal Dant Manjan under Sales Tax Regime.
Sales Tax	Rate of Sales Tax / Trade Tax	253858	2003-04	Classification of Lal Dant Manjan under Sales Tax Regime.
Sales Tax	Rate of Sales Tax / Trade Tax	852900	2006-07	Whether activity carried out by Precise Laboratories (Merged with the company in 2019-2020) to DFL qualifies to be called as “job work” under Sales Tax or not?


There is no other statutory dues which has not been paid on account of any dispute.
